title: Korean Shattering Nut Crumble
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert featuring a Korean-inspired topping with chopped nuts and a hint of shattering texture.

ingredients.name: Shattering
ingredients.notes: Crushed cookies or wafers for added texture

ingredients.name: Korean chili flakes (gochugaru)
ingredients.notes: Optional for an extra spicy kick

instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
In a large bowl, combine sugar, melted butter, and beaten egg. Mix until smooth.
Add the vanilla extract and mix well.
Gradually add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Stir in chopped nuts and shattering.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
While the crumble is baking, prepare the topping by mixing together sugar, gochugaru (if using), and chopped nuts.
Remove the crumble from the oven and sprinkle the topping evenly over the top.
Return the crumble to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes or until the topping is lightly toasted.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely before serving.
